svg.title: demorepo — Process / Data Flow
svg.desc: demorepo data-flow pipeline: the repo source flows through install (→ dependencies), build (→ compiled artifacts), run the entry point (mycli), and verify (→ pass/fail), with each stage's input and output artifact labelled so you can see what data changes at every step.
svg.metadata: Data-flow pipeline: package.json + src/ ⟶ INSTALL (package.json + lock → node_modules/) ⟶ BUILD (src/ + node_modules/ → dist/ bundle) ⟶ RUN (dist/ + CLI args → program output) ⟶ VERIFY (dist/ + test specs → pass / fail report) ⟶ mycli ready.

g.text: 4 stages · derived from the project's node entrypoints
